title: HM Courts and Tribunals Service Board meeting 18 June 2025
body: "The meeting discussed items including:   Social Security and Child Support Venue – Wallace House, Stirling CEO Report Performance & Finance Updates Service Demand Forecast Independent Review of the Criminal Courts (IRCC) / Independent Sentencing Review (ISR): Assessment, Implications of the Spending Review Settlement Overview of the MoJ Planning Work Audit and Risk Assurance Committee (ARAC) – Quarterly Report Risk Reporting and Risk Appetite HMCTS Data Quality Programme  "
